mapper.insert: insert into chat_message ( session_id, role, content, attachment_ids, feedback_score, feedback_reason, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, create_time ) values ( #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{attachmentIds}, #{feedbackScore}, #{feedbackReason}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: select id, session_id, role, content, attachment_ids, feedback_score, feedback_reason, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, create_time from chat_message where id = #{id}

select id, session_id, role, content, attachment_ids, feedback_score, feedback_reason, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, create_time from chat_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time asc

select id, session_id, role, content, attachment_ids, feedback_score, feedback_reason, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, create_time from chat_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time desc limit #{limit}
